summary: Regression check after React list-render key prop changes (array-index -> stable identifiers) in HomePage.jsx, AboutPage.jsx, CommoditiesPage.jsx. Backend (9/9 pytest pass) and frontend (homepage carousel + 3 hero CTAs + 5 commodity cards + 4 differentiator cards + all 6 nav routes + 5 commodity sub-pages + About/Key Facts tab + contact form e2e submission) all working. No console errors or duplicate-key warnings on isolated route tests or full SPA navigation replay.

issues: HTML <title> still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' in /app/frontend/public/index.html (unchanged from iter 8). Cosmetic/SEO only.

passed_tests: Backend pytest 9/9: /api/health, /api/insights (list + by slug), /api/jobs (list + by slug), /api/partners, /api/memberships, /api/contact POST, /api/commodities optional
Homepage: 3 hero dots present (hero-dot-0/1/2); cycling through all 3 slides works without layout shift or errors
Homepage: 5 commodity cards rendered (commodity-card-0..4) with stable key={c.name}
Homepage: 4 differentiator cards rendered (diff-card-0..3) with stable key={d.title}
Homepage: stats counters section renders correctly with stable key={s.label}
Homepage CTAs: Discover Us -> /about/who-we-are works, Company Profile present, Learn More present
About page /about/who-we-are: H1 'Who We Are' renders; Key Facts tab click works; cards render with stable key={fact.label || fact.value}
Commodities /commodities/at-a-glance: H1 'At A Glance' renders; products grid renders with stable key={p.id || p.name || i}
All 5 sub-pages render correct H1: Grains & Feeds, Oilseeds, Pulses & Beans, Sugar & Rice, Coffee
Contact form e2e: POST /api/contact -> 200, 'Message sent successfully!' toast + 'Message Sent!' success state displayed
Zero React duplicate-key warnings across 11 route navigations and carousel interactions in clean replay
Zero console errors / page errors on all tested routes
action_items: Optional (low priority, carried over from iter 8): Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'Peninsula Agritrade LLC' for SEO/branding.
critical_code_review_comments: Key prop changes are correct and use stable identifiers. Note: HomePage.jsx hero dot uses key={s.action} - relies on s.action being unique per slide; verified unique across the 3 hero slides. If a future slide reuses an action label, this will cause dup keys - consider key={s.title || s.action} for extra safety.
CommoditiesPage.jsx line 146 uses key={p.id || p.name || i} - good fallback chain; falling back to index only when both id and name are missing.
AboutPage.jsx key={fact.label || fact.value} - stable as long as labels/values are unique within the keyFacts array.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all key-prop targets verified + carousel + contact submission)

seed_data_creation: One TEST_Regression contact record created via /api/contact POST during e2e test; harmless and prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v). data-testids for key-prop targets: hero-dot-{0,1,2}, commodity-card-{0..4}, diff-card-{0..3}. Contact form: contact-form-name/email/subject/message. The first multi-route playwright run produced one transient React 'two children with the same key' warning that could NOT be reproduced in any subsequent isolated or full-replay test - treated as flaky/transient (likely from a stale HMR boundary during the very first hit). All code-review of key props shows stable identifiers in place. No regression introduced by the key-prop cleanup.
rca of the issue: No real bug. One flaky duplicate-key warning observed once during the first playwright session; not reproducible across 11 subsequent isolated route tests + a full SPA-style navigation replay (12 transitions including hero-dot interactions) with zero warnings. All key={...} usages reviewed in HomePage/AboutPage/CommoditiesPage/Footer/Header are unique within their respective arrays.
